name_en: 🇨🇳🇮🇹🇫🇷CHANEL 26C Early Spring Series, full of luxury ✨ Hobo Hippie Bag 👜 AS5978 Medium Metal. The surface has a delicate short velvet feel, soft and skin-friendly. Vintage gold metal chain, . Paired with a matching cowhide handle, it ensures durability and creates a textural contrast, adding layers and refinement. It adds a highlight to a simple bag. The soft but structured silhouette holds its shape and elevates the style. It is effortless chic, practical, durable, and spacious. The look is very high-end. Dimensions: 29×35×13cm
